en.name: Sudoku X
en.description: Sudoku X adds an exciting twist to the classic puzzle! In addition to rows, columns, and 3×3 boxes, both main diagonals must also contain digits 1-9 exactly once. This extra constraint creates new solving opportunities and requires adjusted strategies. Perfect for Sudoku masters seeking new challenges!
en.objectives: Fill the grid so that each row, column, 3×3 box, AND both diagonals contain digits 1-9 exactly once.
en.howToPlay: Click a cell and enter 1-9. Each row, column, 3x3 box, and both diagonals must contain all digits 1-9 exactly once. Blue cells highlight diagonal constraints.

rules.controls: Click a cell and press 1-9 to enter a number. Press Delete or 0 to clear. Arrow keys navigate between cells.
mechanics: Each row must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
Each column must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
Each 3×3 box must contain digits 1-9 exactly once
Both diagonals must contain digits 1-9 exactly once

tips: Diagonal cells have fewer possible values

faq.question: What makes Sudoku X different from regular Sudoku?
faq.answer: The main diagonals (from top-left to bottom-right AND from top-right to bottom-left) must also contain digits 1-9 exactly once. This adds 18 extra cells with diagonal constraints!

faq.question: Should I focus on diagonals first?
faq.answer: Diagonal cells are powerful because they participate in both row, column, AND diagonal constraints. Starting with diagonal intersections can eliminate candidates quickly.

faq.question: Can I use regular Sudoku techniques?
faq.answer: Absolutely! Naked pairs, hidden singles, X-wings, and all classic techniques work. The diagonal constraint just gives you more information to work with.

faq.question: Is Sudoku X harder than regular Sudoku?
faq.answer: Generally yes, because you have more constraints to satisfy. However, these extra constraints can also make certain deductions easier once you learn to use them.

zh.name: X数独
zh.description: X数独为经典谜题增添了刺激的变化！除了行、列和3×3宫格，两条主对角线也必须恰好包含1-9数字一次。这个额外约束创造了新的解题机会，需要调整策略。非常适合寻求新挑战的数独大师！
zh.objectives: 填充网格，使每行、每列、每个3×3宫格以及两条对角线都恰好包含1-9数字一次。
zh.howToPlay: 填入1-9的数字。每行每列每宫必须恰好包含1-9一次。两条主对角线也必须包含1-9的所有数字。

rules.controls: 点击格子按1-9输入数字。按Delete或0清除。方向键在格子间导航。
mechanics: 每行必须恰好包含1-9数字一次
每列必须恰好包含1-9数字一次
每个3×3宫格必须恰好包含1-9数字一次
两条对角线必须恰好包含1-9数字一次
对角线格子有额外约束

tips: 对角线提供额外的约束
先关注对角线交叉的格子
使用标准数独技巧加对角线约束
对角线有助于消除候选数

faq.question: X数独与普通数独有什么不同？
faq.answer: 主对角线（从左上到右下以及从右上到左下）也必须恰好包含1-9数字一次。这增加了18个有对角线约束的格子！

faq.question: 我应该先关注对角线吗？
faq.answer: 对角线格子很有价值，因为它们同时参与行、列和对角线约束。从对角线交叉点开始可以快速消除候选数。
